Internal Deal Memo  
Project Codename: Lunar Eclipse  

To: Internal Review Team  
From: Dr. Alex Tan  
Date: October 15, 2023  

Overview:  
We are preparing for the acquisition of Stellar Dynamics Pte. Ltd. The agreed purchase price is SGD 25,000,000. The primary document, the Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"), outlines the terms, including a closing date anticipated in Q1 2024. Please ensure all due diligence is completed by December 2023.  

Key Contacts:  
- Dr. Alex Tan Wei Ming, Lead Negotiator, alex.tan@fakemail.sg, +65 6123 4567  
- Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Financial Analyst, siti.abdullah@fakemail.sg  
- Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, Legal Counsel, ramasamy@fakemail.sg  

Identifiers:  
- NRIC for internal use: S2345678Z  
- UEN of acquisition target: T12LL3456A  
- Secure link for document access: https://secureportal.sg/user/S2345678Z  

Please note that the current project status does not reflect any deviations from the project plan. The SPA and related documents are available for review. Further updates will be circulated as necessary.
